entries.name: No single official count
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Scope, counting rules and universal structure
entries.expression: No single official count: strict laws ~ 30-60; major laws/equations ~ 400-700; specialised correlations > 1000
entries.description: Physics has no world registry of laws; this compendium includes laws, principles, postulates, theorems and named equations used as laws.

entries.name: Dimensions of mechanics
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Scope, counting rules and universal structure
entries.description: Mass, length and time form the base dimensions for most classical mechanics.

entries.name: Dimensions of charge
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Scope, counting rules and universal structure
entries.description: Electric charge is current integrated over time.

entries.name: Dimensional homogeneity
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Scope, counting rules and universal structure
entries.expression: Dimensional homogeneity: each term in an equation must have the same dimensions
entries.description: A core consistency law behind all physical formula checking.

entries.name: SI base units
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Scope, counting rules and universal structure
entries.expression: SI base units: m, kg, s, A, K, mol, cd
entries.description: Metre, kilogram, second, ampere, kelvin, mole and candela.

entries.name: Superposition principle
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Scope, counting rules and universal structure
entries.description: Linear systems allow independent contributions to add; used in waves, fields, circuits and quantum states.

entries.name: Locality principle
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Scope, counting rules and universal structure
entries.expression: Locality principle: local interactions propagate no faster than c
entries.description: Modern relativistic field theory is built around local causal structure.

entries.name: Symmetry principle
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Scope, counting rules and universal structure
entries.description: Noether links invariances to conserved quantities.

entries.name: Newton first law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.expression: Newton first law: sum F = 0 -> v = constant
entries.description: A body remains at rest or constant velocity unless acted on by net external force.

entries.name: Newton second law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.expression: Newton second law: sum F = m*a = d p/dt
entries.description: Net force equals rate of change of momentum; for constant mass F = ma.

entries.name: Newton third law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.description: Forces between two interacting bodies are equal in magnitude and opposite in direction.

entries.name: Newton gravitation
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.description: Every mass attracts every other mass with inverse-square force.

entries.name: Inertia
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.description: Inertial mass measures resistance to acceleration.

entries.name: Work
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.description: Work transfers energy through force over displacement.

entries.name: Power
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.description: Power is the rate of work or energy transfer.

entries.name: Kinetic energy
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.description: Energy associated with translational motion.

entries.name: Potential energy near Earth
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.expression: Potential energy near Earth: U = m*g*h
entries.description: Gravitational potential energy for small height changes.

entries.name: Spring potential energy
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.description: Energy stored in a linear spring.

entries.name: Hooke law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.description: Linear restoring force proportional to displacement.

entries.name: Impulse momentum theorem
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.expression: Impulse momentum theorem: J = int F dt = Delta p
entries.description: Impulse equals change in momentum.

entries.name: Work energy theorem
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.expression: Work energy theorem: W_net = Delta K
entries.description: Net work changes kinetic energy.

entries.name: Torque
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.description: Rotational effect of a force about an axis.

entries.name: Angular momentum
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.expression: Angular momentum: L = r x p
entries.description: Rotational analogue of linear momentum.

entries.name: Rotational Newton law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.expression: Rotational Newton law: sum tau = I*alpha
entries.description: Net torque equals moment of inertia times angular acceleration.

entries.name: Moment of inertia
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.expression: Moment of inertia: I = sum m_i*r_i^2 = int r^2 dm
entries.description: Mass distribution resistance to angular acceleration.

entries.name: Rotational kinetic energy
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.description: Energy of rigid-body rotation.

entries.name: Rolling without slipping
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.description: Condition for pure rolling contact.

entries.name: Centripetal acceleration
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.description: Acceleration directed toward centre of circular path.

entries.name: Centripetal force
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.description: Required inward force for circular motion.

entries.name: Friction static
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.description: Static friction adjusts up to a maximum.

entries.name: Friction kinetic
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.description: Sliding friction model proportional to normal force.

entries.name: Drag low Reynolds
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.description: Stokes drag for small spheres in viscous flow.

entries.name: Drag high speed
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.description: Quadratic aerodynamic drag.

entries.name: Terminal velocity
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.description: Maximum falling speed when forces balance.

entries.name: D Alembert principle
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.expression: D Alembert principle: sum(F_i - m_i*a_i)*delta r_i = 0
entries.description: Dynamics converted to virtual-work equilibrium form.

entries.name: Virtual work principle
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.description: Equilibrium condition under virtual displacements.

entries.name: Lagrange equations
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.description: Generalised equations of motion.

entries.name: Euler-Lagrange equation
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.description: Stationary action produces dynamics.

entries.name: Hamilton equations
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.description: Canonical phase-space dynamics.

entries.name: Hamilton principle
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.expression: Hamilton principle: delta S = 0; S = int L dt
entries.description: Actual path extremises the action.

entries.name: Poisson bracket evolution
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.description: Classical observable evolution in Hamiltonian mechanics.

entries.name: Liouville theorem
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.description: Phase-space volume is conserved under Hamiltonian flow.

entries.name: Noether theorem
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.expression: Noether theorem: continuous symmetry -> conserved current
entries.description: Time symmetry gives energy; space symmetry gives momentum; rotation symmetry gives angular momentum.

entries.name: Virial theorem
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.description: Relates average kinetic and potential energy in bound systems.

entries.name: Parallel axis theorem
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.expression: Parallel axis theorem: I = I_cm + M*d^2
entries.description: Moment of inertia about shifted parallel axis.

entries.name: Perpendicular axis theorem
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.expression: Perpendicular axis theorem: I_z = I_x + I_y
entries.description: For planar lamina about perpendicular axis.

entries.name: Coefficient of restitution
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.expression: Coefficient of restitution: e = relative speed after / relative speed before
entries.description: Measures elasticity of impact.

entries.name: Elastic collision 1D
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.description: Momentum and kinetic energy conserved.

entries.name: Inelastic collision
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.expression: Inelastic collision: momentum conserved; kinetic energy not conserved
entries.description: Part of kinetic energy converts to heat/deformation.

entries.name: Center of mass
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.expression: Center of mass: R_cm = sum m_i*r_i / sum m_i
entries.description: Mass-weighted average position.

entries.name: Center of mass motion
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.expression: Center of mass motion: M*Rddot_cm = F_ext
entries.description: COM responds only to external net force.

entries.name: Reduced mass
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.description: Two-body problem reduces to one body of reduced mass.

entries.name: Simple harmonic oscillator
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.expression: Simple harmonic oscillator: x(t)=A*cos(omega t + phi); omega=sqrt(k/m)
entries.description: Linear oscillator law.

entries.name: Pendulum small angle
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.description: Period of simple pendulum for small angles.

entries.name: Torsion oscillator
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.description: Rotational oscillation period.

entries.name: Projectile range level ground
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.expression: Projectile range level ground: R = v0^2*sin(2theta)/g
entries.description: Range without drag for equal launch and landing height.

entries.name: Escape velocity
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Classical mechanics and Newtonian laws
entries.description: Minimum speed to escape gravitational field neglecting drag.

entries.name: Kepler first law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Gravitation, celestial mechanics and orbital laws
entries.expression: Kepler first law: orbit is ellipse with central body at one focus
entries.description: Planetary bound orbit geometry.

entries.name: Kepler second law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Gravitation, celestial mechanics and orbital laws
entries.description: Equal areas swept in equal times; angular momentum conservation.

entries.name: Kepler third law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Gravitation, celestial mechanics and orbital laws
entries.description: Period-squared proportional to semi-major-axis cubed.

entries.name: Orbital speed circular
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Gravitation, celestial mechanics and orbital laws
entries.description: Circular orbit speed.

entries.name: Orbital energy
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Gravitation, celestial mechanics and orbital laws
entries.description: Specific bound orbit energy depends on semi-major axis.

entries.name: Vis-viva equation
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Gravitation, celestial mechanics and orbital laws
entries.description: Speed anywhere on a Kepler orbit.

entries.name: Gravitational potential
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Gravitation, celestial mechanics and orbital laws
entries.description: Potential per unit mass outside spherical mass.

entries.name: Gravitational field
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Gravitation, celestial mechanics and orbital laws
entries.description: Acceleration field from potential.

entries.name: Gauss law for gravity
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Gravitation, celestial mechanics and orbital laws
entries.expression: Gauss law for gravity: oint g*dA = -4*pi*G*M_enclosed
entries.description: Flux of gravity field through closed surface.

entries.name: Poisson gravity equation
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Gravitation, celestial mechanics and orbital laws
entries.description: Potential sourced by mass density.

entries.name: Laplace gravity equation
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Gravitation, celestial mechanics and orbital laws
entries.description: Potential in source-free region.

entries.name: Shell theorem
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Gravitation, celestial mechanics and orbital laws
entries.expression: Shell theorem: spherical shell acts as point mass outside; zero field inside shell
entries.description: Newtonian result for spherical symmetry.

entries.name: Roche limit fluid
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Gravitation, celestial mechanics and orbital laws
entries.description: Tidal disruption distance estimate.

entries.name: Hill radius
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Gravitation, celestial mechanics and orbital laws
entries.description: Region where smaller body dominates satellites.

entries.name: Jeans length
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Gravitation, celestial mechanics and orbital laws
entries.description: Scale above which gravity overcomes pressure support.

entries.name: Jeans mass
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Gravitation, celestial mechanics and orbital laws
entries.description: Mass threshold for gravitational collapse.

entries.name: Chandrasekhar limit
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Gravitation, celestial mechanics and orbital laws
entries.description: Maximum white dwarf mass supported by electron degeneracy.

entries.name: Eddington luminosity
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Gravitation, celestial mechanics and orbital laws
entries.description: Radiation pressure balances gravity for ionized gas.

entries.name: Virial for gravity
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Gravitation, celestial mechanics and orbital laws
entries.description: Bound gravitational system equilibrium average.

entries.name: Tidal acceleration
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Gravitation, celestial mechanics and orbital laws
entries.description: Differential gravitational pull across size R.

entries.name: Lagrange points
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Gravitation, celestial mechanics and orbital laws
entries.description: Equilibrium points in restricted three-body problem.

entries.name: Binet equation
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Gravitation, celestial mechanics and orbital laws
entries.description: Central-force orbit equation.

entries.name: Precession condition
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Gravitation, celestial mechanics and orbital laws
entries.expression: Precession condition: closed orbits for 1/r and r^2 potentials
entries.description: Bertrand theorem result.

entries.name: Newtonian redshift approximation
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Gravitation, celestial mechanics and orbital laws
entries.expression: Newtonian redshift approximation: Delta f/f ~ Delta Phi/c^2
entries.description: Weak-field gravitational frequency shift.

entries.name: Zeroth law thermodynamics
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.expression: Zeroth law thermodynamics: if A in thermal equilibrium with B and B with C, then A with C
entries.description: Defines temperature as a state variable.

entries.name: First law thermodynamics
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.expression: First law thermodynamics: Delta U = Q - W
entries.description: Energy conservation for thermodynamic systems.

entries.name: Second law thermodynamics
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.description: Entropy of isolated system never decreases.

entries.name: Third law thermodynamics
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.expression: Third law thermodynamics: S -> constant as T -> 0 K
entries.description: Perfect crystal entropy tends to zero in ideal statement.

entries.name: Clausius inequality
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.description: Cycle inequality defining entropy.

entries.name: Carnot efficiency
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.description: Maximum heat-engine efficiency between reservoirs.

entries.name: Heat pump COP
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.description: Coefficient of performance for heating.

entries.name: Refrigerator COP
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.description: Coefficient of performance for cooling.

entries.name: Entropy definition reversible
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.expression: Entropy definition reversible: dS = delta Q_rev/T
entries.description: Entropy change for reversible heat transfer.

entries.name: Boltzmann entropy
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.description: Entropy from number of microstates.

entries.name: Gibbs entropy
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.expression: Gibbs entropy: S = -k_B*sum p_i ln p_i
entries.description: Statistical entropy for probabilities.

entries.name: Helmholtz free energy
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.expression: Helmholtz free energy: F = U - T*S
entries.description: Useful work potential at constant temperature and volume.

entries.name: Gibbs free energy
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.expression: Gibbs free energy: G = H - T*S
entries.description: Spontaneity criterion at constant temperature and pressure.

entries.name: Enthalpy
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.description: Thermodynamic potential useful at constant pressure.

entries.name: Thermodynamic identity
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.expression: Thermodynamic identity: dU = T dS - p dV + mu dN
entries.description: Core differential relation.

entries.name: Maxwell relation 1
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.description: From equality of mixed partials.

entries.name: Maxwell relation 2
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.description: From enthalpy.

entries.name: Maxwell relation 3
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.description: From Helmholtz energy.

entries.name: Maxwell relation 4
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.description: From Gibbs energy.

entries.name: Gibbs-Duhem equation
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.expression: Gibbs-Duhem equation: S dT - V dp + sum N_i dmu_i = 0
entries.description: Intensive variables are not independent.

entries.name: Gibbs phase rule
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.expression: Gibbs phase rule: F = C - P + 2
entries.description: Degrees of freedom for phases and components.

entries.name: Clapeyron equation
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.expression: Clapeyron equation: dp/dT = Delta S/Delta V
entries.description: Slope of phase boundary.

entries.name: Clausius-Clapeyron
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.description: Vapor-pressure temperature dependence approximation.

entries.name: Heat capacity constant volume
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.description: Energy needed to raise temperature at constant volume.

entries.name: Heat capacity constant pressure
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.description: Heat needed to raise temperature at constant pressure.

entries.name: Mayer relation ideal gas
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.expression: Mayer relation ideal gas: C_p - C_V = R
entries.description: Ideal-gas heat capacity difference per mole.

entries.name: Adiabatic ideal gas
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.description: Reversible adiabatic ideal gas law.

entries.name: Adiabatic temperature law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.description: Temperature-volume law for ideal gas adiabatic.

entries.name: Adiabatic pressure-temp law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.description: Pressure-temperature adiabatic relation.

entries.name: Equipartition theorem
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.description: Each quadratic degree contributes half kT.

entries.name: Dulong-Petit law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.description: High-temperature molar heat capacity of solids.

entries.name: Debye T cubed law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.expression: Debye T cubed law: C_V proportional T^3
entries.description: Low-temperature lattice heat capacity.

entries.name: Fourier heat conduction
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.expression: Fourier heat conduction: q = -k grad T
entries.description: Heat flux flows down temperature gradient.

entries.name: Thermal diffusion equation
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.expression: Thermal diffusion equation: dT/dt = alpha*nabla^2 T
entries.description: Heat equation for constant properties.

entries.name: Newton cooling law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.description: Convective cooling proportional to temperature difference.

entries.name: Stefan-Boltzmann law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.description: Blackbody radiated power per area.

entries.name: Wien displacement law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.description: Peak blackbody wavelength relation.

entries.name: Planck radiation law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.description: Spectral radiance of blackbody.

entries.name: Rayleigh-Jeans law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.description: Low-frequency blackbody approximation.

entries.name: Kirchhoff thermal radiation law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.expression: Kirchhoff thermal radiation law: emissivity = absorptivity at thermal equilibrium
entries.description: Good absorbers are good emitters.

entries.name: Nernst heat theorem
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.expression: Nernst heat theorem: Delta S -> 0 as T -> 0 for reactions
entries.description: A form of the third law.

entries.name: Joule-Thomson coefficient
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.description: Temperature change under throttling.

entries.name: Onsager reciprocal relations
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.description: Near-equilibrium reciprocal transport coefficients.

entries.name: Fluctuation-dissipation theorem
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.expression: Fluctuation-dissipation theorem: response relates to equilibrium fluctuations
entries.description: Dissipation and noise are linked.

entries.name: Landauer principle
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.expression: Landauer principle: E_min = k_B*T*ln2 per erased bit
entries.description: Information erasure has thermodynamic cost.

entries.name: Jarzynski equality
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.expression: Jarzynski equality: <exp(-beta W)> = exp(-beta Delta F)
entries.description: Non-equilibrium work relation.

entries.name: Crooks fluctuation theorem
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Thermodynamics, heat, entropy and transport laws
entries.description: Forward/reverse work distribution relation.

entries.name: Boyle law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Gas laws and kinetic theory
entries.expression: Boyle law: pV = constant at fixed T,n
entries.description: Pressure inversely proportional to volume.

entries.name: Charles law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Gas laws and kinetic theory
entries.expression: Charles law: V/T = constant at fixed p,n
entries.description: Volume proportional to absolute temperature.

entries.name: Gay-Lussac law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Gas laws and kinetic theory
entries.expression: Gay-Lussac law: p/T = constant at fixed V,n
entries.description: Pressure proportional to absolute temperature.

entries.name: Avogadro law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Gas laws and kinetic theory
entries.expression: Avogadro law: V/n = constant at fixed p,T
entries.description: Volume proportional to amount of gas.

entries.name: Ideal gas law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Gas laws and kinetic theory
entries.expression: Ideal gas law: pV = nRT = N k_B T
entries.description: Equation of state for ideal gas.

entries.name: Combined gas law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Gas laws and kinetic theory
entries.expression: Combined gas law: p1 V1/T1 = p2 V2/T2
entries.description: Fixed amount of ideal gas.

entries.name: Dalton partial pressures
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Gas laws and kinetic theory
entries.expression: Dalton partial pressures: p_total = sum p_i
entries.description: Ideal gas mixture pressure sum.

entries.name: Amagat law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Gas laws and kinetic theory
entries.description: Ideal gas mixture volume sum at same p,T.

entries.name: Graham effusion law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Gas laws and kinetic theory
entries.description: Effusion rate inversely proportional to square root molar mass.

entries.name: Henry law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Gas laws and kinetic theory
entries.description: Gas solubility proportional to partial pressure.

entries.name: Raoult law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Gas laws and kinetic theory
entries.description: Ideal solution vapor pressure contribution.

entries.name: Van der Waals equation
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Gas laws and kinetic theory
entries.expression: Van der Waals equation: (p + a n^2/V^2)(V - nb) = nRT
entries.description: Real-gas correction for attraction and finite size.

entries.name: Virial equation
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Gas laws and kinetic theory
entries.description: Real gas expansion.

entries.name: Maxwell-Boltzmann distribution
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Gas laws and kinetic theory
entries.expression: Maxwell-Boltzmann distribution: f(v)=4pi(m/2pi kT)^(3/2) v^2 exp(-mv^2/2kT)
entries.description: Gas molecular speed distribution.

entries.name: Mean speed
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Gas laws and kinetic theory
entries.description: Average molecular speed.

entries.name: Most probable speed
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Gas laws and kinetic theory
entries.description: Peak of speed distribution.

entries.name: RMS speed
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Gas laws and kinetic theory
entries.description: Root-mean-square speed.

entries.name: Mean free path
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Gas laws and kinetic theory
entries.description: Average distance between collisions.

entries.name: Pressure kinetic relation
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Gas laws and kinetic theory
entries.description: Gas pressure from particle momentum flux.

entries.name: Boltzmann factor
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Gas laws and kinetic theory
entries.description: Relative probability of energy state.

entries.name: Saha equation
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Gas laws and kinetic theory
entries.description: Ionization balance in gas/plasma.

entries.name: Coulomb law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electromagnetism, Maxwell laws and field equations
entries.description: Electrostatic inverse-square force between charges.

entries.name: Electric field definition
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electromagnetism, Maxwell laws and field equations
entries.description: Force per unit positive test charge.

entries.name: Electric potential
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electromagnetism, Maxwell laws and field equations
entries.expression: Electric potential: V = U/q; E = -grad V
entries.description: Potential energy per charge.

entries.name: Gauss law electricity
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electromagnetism, Maxwell laws and field equations
entries.expression: Gauss law electricity: oint E*dA = Q_enclosed/epsilon0
entries.description: Electric flux equals enclosed charge over permittivity.

entries.name: Gauss law magnetism
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electromagnetism, Maxwell laws and field equations
entries.description: No isolated magnetic monopoles in classical electromagnetism.

entries.name: Faraday induction law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electromagnetism, Maxwell laws and field equations
entries.expression: Faraday induction law: oint E*dl = -d Phi_B/dt
entries.description: Changing magnetic flux creates circulating electric field.

entries.name: Ampere-Maxwell law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electromagnetism, Maxwell laws and field equations
entries.expression: Ampere-Maxwell law: oint B*dl = mu0 I + mu0 epsilon0 d Phi_E/dt
entries.description: Currents and changing electric flux create magnetic circulation.

entries.name: Maxwell equations differential
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electromagnetism, Maxwell laws and field equations
entries.expression: Maxwell equations differential: div E=rho/epsilon0; div B=0; curl E=-dB/dt; curl B=mu0 J+mu0 epsilon0 dE/dt
entries.description: Local field equations of electromagnetism.

entries.name: Lorentz force
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electromagnetism, Maxwell laws and field equations
entries.expression: Lorentz force: F = q(E + v x B)
entries.description: Force on charge moving in electromagnetic fields.

entries.name: Electromagnetic wave speed
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electromagnetism, Maxwell laws and field equations
entries.description: EM waves propagate at speed of light in vacuum.

entries.name: Poynting vector
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electromagnetism, Maxwell laws and field equations
entries.expression: Poynting vector: S = (1/mu0) E x B
entries.description: Energy flux density of electromagnetic field.

entries.name: EM energy density
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electromagnetism, Maxwell laws and field equations
entries.expression: EM energy density: u = 1/2(epsilon0 E^2 + B^2/mu0)
entries.description: Energy stored in electromagnetic field.

entries.name: Continuity charge equation
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electromagnetism, Maxwell laws and field equations
entries.expression: Continuity charge equation: d rho/dt + div J = 0
entries.description: Local conservation of electric charge.

entries.name: Ohm law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electromagnetism, Maxwell laws and field equations
entries.expression: Ohm law: V = I R; J = sigma E
entries.description: Linear relation between voltage/current and field/current density.

entries.name: Resistivity
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electromagnetism, Maxwell laws and field equations
entries.description: Resistance from material and geometry.

entries.name: Joule heating
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electromagnetism, Maxwell laws and field equations
entries.expression: Joule heating: P = I^2 R = V I = V^2/R
entries.description: Electrical power dissipated as heat.

entries.name: Kirchhoff current law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electromagnetism, Maxwell laws and field equations
entries.expression: Kirchhoff current law: sum currents into node = sum currents out
entries.description: Charge conservation in circuits.

entries.name: Kirchhoff voltage law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electromagnetism, Maxwell laws and field equations
entries.expression: Kirchhoff voltage law: sum voltage rises/drops around loop = 0
entries.description: Energy conservation in lumped circuits.

entries.name: Capacitance
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electromagnetism, Maxwell laws and field equations
entries.description: Charge stored per voltage.

entries.name: Parallel plate capacitance
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electromagnetism, Maxwell laws and field equations
entries.expression: Parallel plate capacitance: C = epsilon A/d
entries.description: Capacitance of plate geometry.

entries.name: Capacitor energy
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electromagnetism, Maxwell laws and field equations
entries.expression: Capacitor energy: U = 1/2 C V^2 = Q^2/(2C)
entries.description: Energy stored in electric field.

entries.name: Inductance
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electromagnetism, Maxwell laws and field equations
entries.description: Back-emf from changing current.

entries.name: Inductor energy
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electromagnetism, Maxwell laws and field equations
entries.description: Energy stored in magnetic field.

entries.name: Biot-Savart law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electromagnetism, Maxwell laws and field equations
entries.expression: Biot-Savart law: dB = mu0/(4pi) I dl x rhat/r^2
entries.description: Magnetic field contribution from current element.

entries.name: Ampere force wires
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electromagnetism, Maxwell laws and field equations
entries.expression: Ampere force wires: F/L = mu0 I1 I2/(2pi r)
entries.description: Force per length between parallel currents.

entries.name: Lenz law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electromagnetism, Maxwell laws and field equations
entries.expression: Lenz law: induced current opposes change causing it
entries.description: Direction law for induction.

entries.name: Faraday transformer emf
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electromagnetism, Maxwell laws and field equations
entries.expression: Faraday transformer emf: emf = -N d Phi_B/dt
entries.description: Induced emf in coil.

entries.name: Magnetic flux
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electromagnetism, Maxwell laws and field equations
entries.description: Magnetic field through a surface.

entries.name: Hall effect
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electromagnetism, Maxwell laws and field equations
entries.expression: Hall effect: V_H = I B/(n q t)
entries.description: Transverse voltage from current in magnetic field.

entries.name: Cyclotron radius
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electromagnetism, Maxwell laws and field equations
entries.expression: Cyclotron radius: r = m v/(q B)
entries.description: Radius of charged particle in uniform magnetic field.

entries.name: Cyclotron frequency
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electromagnetism, Maxwell laws and field equations
entries.description: Angular frequency in magnetic field.

entries.name: Larmor radius
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electromagnetism, Maxwell laws and field equations
entries.description: Gyroradius of charged particle.

entries.name: Larmor power
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electromagnetism, Maxwell laws and field equations
entries.description: Radiated power from accelerating nonrelativistic charge.

entries.name: Aharonov-Bohm phase
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electromagnetism, Maxwell laws and field equations
entries.expression: Aharonov-Bohm phase: Delta phi = q Phi_B/hbar
entries.description: Quantum phase from vector potential despite zero local B.

entries.name: London equation
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electromagnetism, Maxwell laws and field equations
entries.description: Magnetic field expulsion in superconductor.

entries.name: Josephson current
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electromagnetism, Maxwell laws and field equations
entries.expression: Josephson current: I = I_c sin phi
entries.description: Supercurrent through Josephson junction.

entries.name: AC Josephson relation
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electromagnetism, Maxwell laws and field equations
entries.description: Voltage-phase evolution in junction.

entries.name: Meissner effect
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electromagnetism, Maxwell laws and field equations
entries.expression: Meissner effect: B expelled from superconductor
entries.description: Superconductors actively expel magnetic fields.

entries.name: Curie law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electromagnetism, Maxwell laws and field equations
entries.description: Paramagnetic susceptibility law.

entries.name: Curie-Weiss law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electromagnetism, Maxwell laws and field equations
entries.description: Magnetic susceptibility near ordering.

entries.name: Gauss capacitance sphere
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electromagnetism, Maxwell laws and field equations
entries.description: Isolated conducting sphere capacitance.

entries.name: Skin depth
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electromagnetism, Maxwell laws and field equations
entries.expression: Skin depth: delta = sqrt(2/(omega mu sigma))
entries.description: AC penetration depth in conductor.

entries.name: Poynting theorem
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electromagnetism, Maxwell laws and field equations
entries.expression: Poynting theorem: d u/dt + div S = -J*E
entries.description: EM energy conservation law.

entries.name: Maxwell stress tensor
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electromagnetism, Maxwell laws and field equations
entries.expression: Maxwell stress tensor: force from field momentum flux
entries.description: Stress representation of electromagnetic forces.

entries.name: RC charging
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electrical circuits, electronics and information laws
entries.description: Capacitor charge transient.

entries.name: RC discharging
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electrical circuits, electronics and information laws
entries.description: Capacitor discharge transient.

entries.name: RL current rise
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electrical circuits, electronics and information laws
entries.description: Inductor current transient.

entries.name: LC resonance
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electrical circuits, electronics and information laws
entries.description: Ideal resonant angular frequency.

entries.name: RLC series impedance
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electrical circuits, electronics and information laws
entries.expression: RLC series impedance: Z = R + j(omega L - 1/(omega C))
entries.description: Frequency-domain impedance.

entries.name: Capacitive reactance
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electrical circuits, electronics and information laws
entries.description: Imaginary impedance of capacitor.

entries.name: Inductive reactance
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electrical circuits, electronics and information laws
entries.description: Imaginary impedance of inductor.

entries.name: AC real power
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electrical circuits, electronics and information laws
entries.expression: AC real power: P = V_rms I_rms cos phi
entries.description: Average power in sinusoidal AC circuit.

entries.name: Reactive power
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electrical circuits, electronics and information laws
entries.expression: Reactive power: Q = V_rms I_rms sin phi
entries.description: Oscillatory power in reactive elements.

entries.name: Apparent power
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electrical circuits, electronics and information laws
entries.description: Magnitude of complex power.

entries.name: Power factor
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electrical circuits, electronics and information laws
entries.expression: Power factor: PF = cos phi = P/S
entries.description: Fraction of apparent power doing real work.

entries.name: Three phase power
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electrical circuits, electronics and information laws
entries.expression: Three phase power: P = sqrt(3) V_LL I_L cos phi
entries.description: Balanced three-phase real power.

entries.name: Star line voltage
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electrical circuits, electronics and information laws
entries.expression: Star line voltage: V_LL = sqrt(3) V_phase
entries.description: Wye voltage relation.

entries.name: Delta current relation
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electrical circuits, electronics and information laws
entries.expression: Delta current relation: I_L = sqrt(3) I_phase
entries.description: Delta current relation.

entries.name: Thevenin theorem
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electrical circuits, electronics and information laws
entries.expression: Thevenin theorem: network -> V_th in series with R_th
entries.description: Linear two-terminal network equivalence.

entries.name: Norton theorem
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electrical circuits, electronics and information laws
entries.expression: Norton theorem: network -> I_N in parallel with R_N
entries.description: Current-source equivalent.

entries.name: Maximum power transfer
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electrical circuits, electronics and information laws
entries.expression: Maximum power transfer: R_load = R_source for DC; Z_L = Z_S* for AC
entries.description: Load condition for maximum delivered power.

entries.name: Superposition theorem circuits
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electrical circuits, electronics and information laws
entries.expression: Superposition theorem circuits: response = sum response from each independent source
entries.description: Valid in linear circuits.

entries.name: Tellegen theorem
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electrical circuits, electronics and information laws
entries.expression: Tellegen theorem: sum branch v_k i_k = 0
entries.description: Power conservation in network topology.

entries.name: Barkhausen criterion
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electrical circuits, electronics and information laws
entries.expression: Barkhausen criterion: |A beta|=1 and phase=0 mod 2pi
entries.description: Oscillation condition.

entries.name: Nyquist stability criterion
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electrical circuits, electronics and information laws
entries.expression: Nyquist stability criterion: encirclements of -1 determine closed-loop stability
entries.description: Frequency-domain stability law.

entries.name: Bode gain phase relation
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electrical circuits, electronics and information laws
entries.expression: Bode gain phase relation: minimum-phase magnitude and phase linked by Hilbert transform
entries.description: Network response constraint.

entries.name: Shockley diode equation
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electrical circuits, electronics and information laws
entries.expression: Shockley diode equation: I = I_s(exp(V_D/(n V_T))-1)
entries.description: Ideal diode current-voltage law.

entries.name: Thermal voltage
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electrical circuits, electronics and information laws
entries.description: Voltage scale for semiconductor junctions.

entries.name: MOS square law saturation
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electrical circuits, electronics and information laws
entries.expression: MOS square law saturation: I_D = 1/2 mu C_ox W/L (V_GS - V_T)^2
entries.description: Long-channel MOSFET saturation approximation.

entries.name: Johnson-Nyquist noise
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electrical circuits, electronics and information laws
entries.expression: Johnson-Nyquist noise: v_n^2 = 4 kT R Delta f
entries.description: Thermal noise voltage.

entries.name: Shot noise
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electrical circuits, electronics and information laws
entries.expression: Shot noise: i_n^2 = 2 q I Delta f
entries.description: Discrete charge carrier noise.

entries.name: Friis transmission equation
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electrical circuits, electronics and information laws
entries.expression: Friis transmission equation: P_r = P_t G_t G_r (lambda/(4pi R))^2
entries.description: Free-space radio link power.

entries.name: Shannon-Hartley theorem
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electrical circuits, electronics and information laws
entries.expression: Shannon-Hartley theorem: C = B log2(1 + S/N)
entries.description: Channel capacity under Gaussian noise.

entries.name: Nyquist sampling theorem
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electrical circuits, electronics and information laws
entries.description: Minimum sampling frequency to avoid aliasing.

entries.name: Telegrapher equations
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electrical circuits, electronics and information laws
entries.description: Transmission-line voltage/current propagation.

entries.name: Characteristic impedance
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electrical circuits, electronics and information laws
entries.description: Transmission line impedance.

entries.name: Reflection coefficient
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electrical circuits, electronics and information laws
entries.description: Voltage-wave reflection at load.

entries.name: VSWR
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electrical circuits, electronics and information laws
entries.description: Standing-wave ratio.

entries.name: Transformer ideal law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Electrical circuits, electronics and information laws
entries.expression: Transformer ideal law: V_s/V_p = N_s/N_p; I_s/I_p = N_p/N_s
entries.description: Ideal transformer ratio.

entries.name: Wave equation
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Waves, sound, optics and radiation laws
entries.description: Governs ideal wave propagation.

entries.name: Wave speed string
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Waves, sound, optics and radiation laws
entries.description: Transverse wave speed on stretched string.

entries.name: Sound speed ideal gas
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Waves, sound, optics and radiation laws
entries.expression: Sound speed ideal gas: v = sqrt(gamma R T/M)
entries.description: Adiabatic sound speed in gas.

entries.name: Frequency wavelength
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Waves, sound, optics and radiation laws
entries.description: Basic wave relation.

entries.name: Angular frequency
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Waves, sound, optics and radiation laws
entries.description: Cycles per second to radians per second.

entries.name: Wave number
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Waves, sound, optics and radiation laws
entries.description: Spatial angular frequency.

entries.name: Phase velocity
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Waves, sound, optics and radiation laws
entries.description: Speed of constant phase.

entries.name: Group velocity
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Waves, sound, optics and radiation laws
entries.description: Envelope/information speed in dispersive medium.

entries.name: Doppler sound moving source
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Waves, sound, optics and radiation laws
entries.expression: Doppler sound moving source: f_prime = f (v +/- v_o)/(v -/+ v_s)
entries.description: Observed frequency shift for sound.

entries.name: Relativistic Doppler
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Waves, sound, optics and radiation laws
entries.expression: Relativistic Doppler: f_obs = f_src sqrt((1-beta)/(1+beta)) for receding
entries.description: Light frequency shift from relative motion.

entries.name: Standing wave string
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Waves, sound, optics and radiation laws
entries.expression: Standing wave string: f_n = n v/(2L)
entries.description: Both ends fixed harmonics.

entries.name: Open pipe harmonics
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Waves, sound, optics and radiation laws
entries.expression: Open pipe harmonics: f_n = n v/(2L)
entries.description: Open-open pipe resonances.

entries.name: Closed pipe harmonics
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Waves, sound, optics and radiation laws
entries.expression: Closed pipe harmonics: f_n = n v/(4L), odd n
entries.description: Open-closed pipe resonances.

entries.name: Beat frequency
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Waves, sound, optics and radiation laws
entries.description: Amplitude modulation between close frequencies.

entries.name: Intensity inverse square
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Waves, sound, optics and radiation laws
entries.description: Spherical wave intensity drop.

entries.name: Decibel level
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Waves, sound, optics and radiation laws
entries.description: Logarithmic sound intensity level.

entries.name: Acoustic impedance
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Waves, sound, optics and radiation laws
entries.description: Pressure/particle velocity ratio.

entries.name: Sabine reverberation
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Waves, sound, optics and radiation laws
entries.description: Room reverberation time estimate.

entries.name: Huygens principle
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Waves, sound, optics and radiation laws
entries.expression: Huygens principle: each wavefront point acts as secondary source
entries.description: Wavefront propagation construction.

entries.name: Fermat principle
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Waves, sound, optics and radiation laws
entries.description: Light path extremises optical time.

entries.name: Law of reflection
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Waves, sound, optics and radiation laws
entries.description: Angle of incidence equals angle of reflection.

entries.name: Snell law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Waves, sound, optics and radiation laws
entries.expression: Snell law: n1 sin theta1 = n2 sin theta2
entries.description: Refraction at interface.

entries.name: Critical angle
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Waves, sound, optics and radiation laws
entries.expression: Critical angle: sin theta_c = n2/n1 for n1>n2
entries.description: Total internal reflection threshold.

entries.name: Brewster law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Waves, sound, optics and radiation laws
entries.description: Zero reflected p-polarized light.

entries.name: Malus law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Waves, sound, optics and radiation laws
entries.expression: Malus law: I = I0 cos^2 theta
entries.description: Polarizer transmitted intensity.

entries.name: Lens equation
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Waves, sound, optics and radiation laws
entries.description: Thin lens imaging.

entries.name: Magnification
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Waves, sound, optics and radiation laws
entries.description: Image magnification.

entries.name: Mirror equation
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Waves, sound, optics and radiation laws
entries.description: Spherical mirror relation.

entries.name: Lensmaker equation
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Waves, sound, optics and radiation laws
entries.description: Thin lens focal length in air.

entries.name: Young double slit
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Waves, sound, optics and radiation laws
entries.expression: Young double slit: d sin theta = m lambda
entries.description: Constructive interference maxima.

entries.name: Single slit minima
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Waves, sound, optics and radiation laws
entries.expression: Single slit minima: a sin theta = m lambda
entries.description: Diffraction minima.

entries.name: Diffraction grating
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Waves, sound, optics and radiation laws
entries.expression: Diffraction grating: d sin theta = m lambda
entries.description: Grating maxima condition.

entries.name: Bragg law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Waves, sound, optics and radiation laws
entries.expression: Bragg law: n lambda = 2 d sin theta
entries.description: Crystal diffraction condition.

entries.name: Rayleigh criterion
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Waves, sound, optics and radiation laws
entries.description: Resolution limit for circular aperture.

entries.name: Abbe limit
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Waves, sound, optics and radiation laws
entries.description: Microscope diffraction resolution limit.

entries.name: Beer-Lambert law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Waves, sound, optics and radiation laws
entries.expression: Beer-Lambert law: A = epsilon l c = -log10(I/I0)
entries.description: Absorbance proportional to concentration and path length.

entries.name: Lambert cosine law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Waves, sound, optics and radiation laws
entries.expression: Lambert cosine law: I(theta)=I0 cos theta
entries.description: Radiant intensity from ideal diffuse surface.

entries.name: Fresnel normal incidence
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Waves, sound, optics and radiation laws
entries.description: Reflectance at normal incidence.

entries.name: Rayleigh scattering
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Waves, sound, optics and radiation laws
entries.description: Short wavelengths scatter more strongly.

entries.name: Compton shift
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Waves, sound, optics and radiation laws
entries.expression: Compton shift: Delta lambda = (h/(m_e c))(1-cos theta)
entries.description: Photon-electron scattering wavelength shift.

entries.name: Photoelectric equation
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Waves, sound, optics and radiation laws
entries.expression: Photoelectric equation: K_max = h f - phi
entries.description: Maximum electron kinetic energy from photons.

entries.name: Archimedes principle
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Fluid mechanics, aerodynamics and hydrodynamic laws
entries.expression: Archimedes principle: F_b = rho_fluid g V_displaced
entries.description: Buoyant force equals weight of displaced fluid.

entries.name: Pascal law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Fluid mechanics, aerodynamics and hydrodynamic laws
entries.expression: Pascal law: pressure change transmitted undiminished in enclosed fluid
entries.description: Foundation of hydraulics.

entries.name: Hydrostatic pressure
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Fluid mechanics, aerodynamics and hydrodynamic laws
entries.expression: Hydrostatic pressure: p = p0 + rho g h
entries.description: Pressure increases with depth.

entries.name: Continuity incompressible
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Fluid mechanics, aerodynamics and hydrodynamic laws
entries.expression: Continuity incompressible: A1 v1 = A2 v2
entries.description: Volume flow rate conservation.

entries.name: Mass continuity
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Fluid mechanics, aerodynamics and hydrodynamic laws
entries.expression: Mass continuity: d rho/dt + div(rho v)=0
entries.description: Mass conservation in fluids.

entries.name: Bernoulli equation
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Fluid mechanics, aerodynamics and hydrodynamic laws
entries.expression: Bernoulli equation: p + 1/2 rho v^2 + rho g z = constant
entries.description: Energy conservation along streamline.

entries.name: Torricelli law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Fluid mechanics, aerodynamics and hydrodynamic laws
entries.description: Efflux speed from hole under head h.

entries.name: Navier-Stokes equation
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Fluid mechanics, aerodynamics and hydrodynamic laws
entries.expression: Navier-Stokes equation: rho(Dv/Dt) = -grad p + mu nabla^2 v + f
entries.description: Momentum balance for viscous Newtonian fluid.

entries.name: Euler fluid equation
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Fluid mechanics, aerodynamics and hydrodynamic laws
entries.expression: Euler fluid equation: rho(Dv/Dt) = -grad p + f
entries.description: Inviscid flow momentum equation.

entries.name: Newton viscosity law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Fluid mechanics, aerodynamics and hydrodynamic laws
entries.expression: Newton viscosity law: tau = mu du/dy
entries.description: Shear stress proportional to velocity gradient.

entries.name: Poiseuille law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Fluid mechanics, aerodynamics and hydrodynamic laws
entries.expression: Poiseuille law: Q = pi r^4 Delta p/(8 mu L)
entries.description: Laminar flow rate through circular pipe.

entries.name: Darcy law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Fluid mechanics, aerodynamics and hydrodynamic laws
entries.expression: Darcy law: Q = -k A Delta p/(mu L)
entries.description: Flow through porous media.

entries.name: Darcy-Weisbach
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Fluid mechanics, aerodynamics and hydrodynamic laws
entries.expression: Darcy-Weisbach: Delta p = f_D (L/D) rho v^2/2
entries.description: Pipe friction pressure loss.

entries.name: Reynolds number
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Fluid mechanics, aerodynamics and hydrodynamic laws
entries.expression: Reynolds number: Re = rho v L/mu
entries.description: Ratio of inertial to viscous forces.

entries.name: Froude number
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Fluid mechanics, aerodynamics and hydrodynamic laws
entries.description: Ratio of flow speed to gravity wave speed.

entries.name: Mach number
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Fluid mechanics, aerodynamics and hydrodynamic laws
entries.description: Flow speed relative to sound.

entries.name: Weber number
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Fluid mechanics, aerodynamics and hydrodynamic laws
entries.expression: Weber number: We = rho v^2 L/sigma
entries.description: Inertial to surface tension forces.

entries.name: Bond number
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Fluid mechanics, aerodynamics and hydrodynamic laws
entries.expression: Bond number: Bo = rho g L^2/sigma
entries.description: Gravity to surface tension forces.

entries.name: Capillary number
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Fluid mechanics, aerodynamics and hydrodynamic laws
entries.description: Viscous to surface tension forces.

entries.name: Prandtl number
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Fluid mechanics, aerodynamics and hydrodynamic laws
entries.description: Momentum diffusivity to thermal diffusivity.

entries.name: Nusselt number
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Fluid mechanics, aerodynamics and hydrodynamic laws
entries.description: Convective to conductive heat transfer.

entries.name: Rayleigh number
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Fluid mechanics, aerodynamics and hydrodynamic laws
entries.expression: Rayleigh number: Ra = g beta DeltaT L^3/(nu alpha)
entries.description: Natural convection criterion.

entries.name: Grashof number
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Fluid mechanics, aerodynamics and hydrodynamic laws
entries.expression: Grashof number: Gr = g beta DeltaT L^3/nu^2
entries.description: Buoyancy to viscous forces.

entries.name: Strouhal number
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Fluid mechanics, aerodynamics and hydrodynamic laws
entries.description: Oscillating flow scaling.

entries.name: Stokes law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Fluid mechanics, aerodynamics and hydrodynamic laws
entries.expression: Stokes law: F_d = 6 pi mu r v
entries.description: Creeping-flow drag on sphere.

entries.name: Stokes settling velocity
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Fluid mechanics, aerodynamics and hydrodynamic laws
entries.expression: Stokes settling velocity: v_t = 2 r^2 (rho_p-rho_f) g/(9 mu)
entries.description: Terminal speed of small sphere.

entries.name: Young-Laplace equation
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Fluid mechanics, aerodynamics and hydrodynamic laws
entries.description: Pressure jump across curved interface.

entries.name: Jurin capillary rise
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Fluid mechanics, aerodynamics and hydrodynamic laws
entries.expression: Jurin capillary rise: h = 2 gamma cos theta/(rho g r)
entries.description: Capillary rise in tube.

entries.name: Kutta-Joukowski lift
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Fluid mechanics, aerodynamics and hydrodynamic laws
entries.expression: Kutta-Joukowski lift: L_prime = rho v Gamma
entries.description: Lift per span from circulation.

entries.name: Magnus effect
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Fluid mechanics, aerodynamics and hydrodynamic laws
entries.expression: Magnus effect: lift from rotating body in flow
entries.description: Spin-induced transverse force.

entries.name: Venturi effect
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Fluid mechanics, aerodynamics and hydrodynamic laws
entries.expression: Venturi effect: higher speed -> lower pressure
entries.description: Consequence of Bernoulli.

entries.name: Coanda effect
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Fluid mechanics, aerodynamics and hydrodynamic laws
entries.expression: Coanda effect: jet attaches to nearby curved surface

entries.description: Ideal vortex dynamics.

entries.expression: Rankine-Hugoniot conditions: conservation jumps across shock
entries.description: Shock discontinuity relations.

entries.description: Relativistic scaling factor.

entries.expression: Time dilation: Delta t = gamma Delta tau

entries.description: Moving lengths contract along motion.

entries.name: Relativistic velocity addition
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Relativity, spacetime and cosmology equations
entries.description: Velocity transformation.

entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Relativity, spacetime and cosmology equations
entries.description: Rest energy of mass.

entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Relativity, spacetime and cosmology equations
entries.description: Relativistic energy and momentum.

entries.expression: Relativistic momentum: p = gamma m v

entries.expression: Minkowski interval: s^2 = c^2 t^2 - x^2 - y^2 - z^2

entries.name: Gravitational time dilation

entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Relativity, spacetime and cosmology equations
entries.expression: Gravitational redshift: z approx Delta Phi/c^2

entries.name: Light deflection weak field
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Relativity, spacetime and cosmology equations
entries.expression: Light deflection weak field: alpha = 4GM/(c^2 b)
entries.description: GR bending angle by mass.

entries.name: Perihelion precession
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Relativity, spacetime and cosmology equations
entries.description: GR correction per orbit.

entries.name: Friedmann equation
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Relativity, spacetime and cosmology equations
entries.expression: Friedmann equation: (a_dot/a)^2 = 8piG rho/3 - k c^2/a^2 + Lambda c^2/3

entries.name: Acceleration Friedmann
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Relativity, spacetime and cosmology equations
entries.description: Cosmic acceleration equation.

entries.name: Hubble-Lemaitre law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Relativity, spacetime and cosmology equations
entries.description: Recession velocity proportional to distance.

entries.name: Bekenstein-Hawking entropy
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Relativity, spacetime and cosmology equations
entries.expression: Bekenstein-Hawking entropy: S = k c^3 A/(4 G hbar)

entries.name: Hawking temperature
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Relativity, spacetime and cosmology equations
entries.expression: Hawking temperature: T_H = hbar c^3/(8 pi G M k_B)

entries.expression: Black hole area theorem: dA >= 0 classically

entries.name: No-hair theorem
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Relativity, spacetime and cosmology equations
entries.expression: No-hair theorem: stationary black holes described by M,J,Q
entries.description: Black holes have limited external parameters.

entries.name: Shapiro delay
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Relativity, spacetime and cosmology equations
entries.expression: Shapiro delay: extra light travel time near mass
entries.description: GR time delay of signals passing near gravity.

entries.name: Planck quantum relation
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Quantum mechanics, atomic laws and quantum information
entries.expression: Planck quantum relation: E = h f = hbar omega
entries.description: Energy of photon/quantum proportional to frequency.

entries.name: de Broglie wavelength
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Quantum mechanics, atomic laws and quantum information

entries.name: Schrodinger time dependent

entries.expression: Schrodinger time dependent: i hbar dPsi/dt = H Psi
entries.description: Quantum state time evolution.

entries.name: Schrodinger time independent
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Quantum mechanics, atomic laws and quantum information
entries.expression: Schrodinger time independent: H psi = E psi
entries.description: Energy eigenvalue equation.

entries.name: Born rule
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Quantum mechanics, atomic laws and quantum information
entries.description: Probability density from wavefunction amplitude.

entries.name: Normalization
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Quantum mechanics, atomic laws and quantum information
entries.description: Total probability is one.

entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Quantum mechanics, atomic laws and quantum information

entries.name: Energy-time uncertainty
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Quantum mechanics, atomic laws and quantum information
entries.expression: Energy-time uncertainty: Delta E Delta t >= hbar/2
entries.description: Energy-time spread relation.

entries.name: Commutation canonical
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Quantum mechanics, atomic laws and quantum information
entries.description: Canonical quantum commutator.

entries.name: Angular momentum commutator
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Quantum mechanics, atomic laws and quantum information
entries.description: Rotational quantum algebra.

entries.name: Spin quantization
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Quantum mechanics, atomic laws and quantum information
entries.description: Spin magnitude/projection eigenvalues.

entries.name: Pauli exclusion principle
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Quantum mechanics, atomic laws and quantum information

entries.name: Superposition principle quantum
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Quantum mechanics, atomic laws and quantum information
entries.expression: Superposition principle quantum: psi = c1 psi1 + c2 psi2
entries.description: Linear combinations of states are states.

entries.name: Projection postulate
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Quantum mechanics, atomic laws and quantum information
entries.expression: Projection postulate: measurement projects state onto eigenstate
entries.description: Ideal measurement update rule.

entries.name: Ehrenfest theorem
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Quantum mechanics, atomic laws and quantum information
entries.expression:
Ehrenfest theorem: d< x >/dt=

/m; d

/dt=<-grad V>
entries.description: Quantum averages obey classical-like equations.

entries.name: Fermi golden rule
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Quantum mechanics, atomic laws and quantum information
entries.expression: Fermi golden rule: transition rate = (2pi/hbar)|M|^2 rho(E)
entries.description: Perturbative transition rate.

entries.name: Quantum tunnelling WKB
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Quantum mechanics, atomic laws and quantum information

entries.name: Harmonic oscillator energy
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Quantum mechanics, atomic laws and quantum information
entries.expression: Harmonic oscillator energy: E_n = hbar omega(n+1/2)
entries.description: Quantized oscillator levels.

entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Quantum mechanics, atomic laws and quantum information
entries.expression: Particle in box: E_n = n^2 h^2/(8mL^2)

entries.name: Hydrogen energy levels
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Quantum mechanics, atomic laws and quantum information
entries.description: Bohr/Schrodinger hydrogen spectrum.

entries.name: Bohr angular momentum
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Quantum mechanics, atomic laws and quantum information

entries.expression: Bohr radius: a0 = 4pi epsilon0 hbar^2/(m_e e^2)

entries.name: Dirac equation
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Quantum mechanics, atomic laws and quantum information
entries.expression: Dirac equation: (i hbar gamma^mu d_mu - mc) psi = 0
entries.description: Relativistic spin-1/2 wave equation.

entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Quantum mechanics, atomic laws and quantum information

entries.name: Pauli equation
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Quantum mechanics, atomic laws and quantum information
entries.expression: Pauli equation: spin magnetic coupling included in Schrodinger equation

entries.name: Bose-Einstein distribution
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Quantum mechanics, atomic laws and quantum information

entries.name: Fermi-Dirac distribution
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Quantum mechanics, atomic laws and quantum information
entries.description: Fermion occupation number.

entries.name: Maxwell-Boltzmann limit
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Quantum mechanics, atomic laws and quantum information
entries.description: Classical low-density distribution.

entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Quantum mechanics, atomic laws and quantum information

entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Quantum mechanics, atomic laws and quantum information

entries.name: Bell theorem

entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Quantum mechanics, atomic laws and quantum information
entries.expression: Bell CHSH inequality: |S| <= 2 for local hidden variables
entries.description: Experimentally testable inequality.

entries.name: No-cloning theorem
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Quantum mechanics, atomic laws and quantum information
entries.expression: No-cloning theorem: unknown arbitrary quantum state cannot be copied
entries.description: Linearity forbids perfect cloning.

entries.name: No-deleting theorem
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Quantum mechanics, atomic laws and quantum information
entries.expression: No-deleting theorem: unknown quantum information cannot be deleted unitarily

entries.name: Quantum Zeno effect
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Quantum mechanics, atomic laws and quantum information
entries.expression: Quantum Zeno effect: frequent measurement inhibits evolution

entries.name: Density matrix evolution

entries.expression: Path integral amplitude: K = int exp(iS/hbar) D[path]

entries.name: Shear modulus
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Solid state, materials science and condensed matter laws
entries.description: Linear shear stress-strain law.

entries.name: Bulk modulus
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Solid state, materials science and condensed matter laws

entries.name: Poisson ratio
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Solid state, materials science and condensed matter laws
entries.description: Transverse contraction ratio.

entries.name: Hooke generalized
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Solid state, materials science and condensed matter laws

entries.name: Coffin-Manson law

entries.name: Miner rule

entries.name: Fick second law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Solid state, materials science and condensed matter laws

entries.name: Arrhenius equation

entries.name: Nernst-Einstein relation
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Solid state, materials science and condensed matter laws
entries.description: Diffusion coefficient and mobility link.

entries.name: Matthiessen rule
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Solid state, materials science and condensed matter laws

entries.name: Wiedemann-Franz law
entries.catalogue: Physics V4 · Solid state, materials science and condensed matter laws

entries.name: Bragg law

entries.name: Curie temperature law

entries.name: Debye shielding
